review_text: Nice spacious holiday park, walking distance to local cafes and beaches~
Great band on Saturday
Great for family and friends to spend fun quality time and great atmosphere for the kids
Great park,  quiet,the people are friendly
Looking forward every year  to coming here and enjoying the family fun, beaches , pools. Absolutely love Ellie and Matt and how welcoming they are.

I owned a caravan in the park for several years and only recently sold it, but I just wanted to say how wonderful the managers Ellie & Matt have been .They’re friendly, caring, and always go out of their way to help. The park was always spotless and had such a welcoming, community feel. I always felt looked after and appreciated. They really make the park a special place, couldn’t recommend them more!
Great management and very friendly. Park often has entertainment like live bands over summer , market stalls, activities for kids and many other activities.

Close to beach and shops. Bit close to freeway, but a good central spot.
Staff are friendly, all clean. Would stay again

The park itself is incredible. The amenities are always clean and tidy and are easily accessible from all over.
Close the shops without the busy hustle.
The staff bend over backwards to accomodate you and go above and beyond. I’d give more stars if it were an option.

We purchased our on-site van about a year ago it’s our home away from home The park is so close to the beach shops cafes and restaurants The holiday park is like a little community We love it ! Management Ellie and Matt are very welcoming and we have loved the extra activities they bring to the park (bands, cannoli ,coffee vans, soccer games etc…. It adds a lot of atmosphere around the park.
We are very new to caravan living but I’m guessing we might be staying for quite a while
I cannot recommend this park more highly. Everyone is super friendly. Ellie and Matt (The Mangers) are also amazing. We’ve been here for a year now and have met lots of new friends.
Great park,mangers have worked hard to make it a great place to enjoy our summer holidays and our weekends
We love being part of the Peninsula Holiday Park  . Matt and Ellie are doing a fantastic job running the park , keeping it clean and running social activities
Amazing family friendly park. When you purchase a site you can bring your fury friend with you as well. Great people and memories to be made

I’ve been staying at this park for the past 4 years, and I must say, the transformation over the last two years under the direction of Matt and Ellie has been remarkable. They are incredibly friendly, attentive and always keep us informed of happenings and well planned activities in the area. The park is impeccably maintained, and the amenities are exceptionally clean, making it a truly enjoyable place to visit.

My family have had a couple of cabins in the park over the last 4 years.  It is our favorite holiday destination.  Great beach, easy walk to shops and cafes,  safe and friendly environment and the park management, Ellie, Matt and the team are sensational managers.  They are constantly working on enhancements throughout the park, warm and friendly and always available to assist.  Although our children are adults we love watching the many activities that the management prepare for the children to make their stays fun.  One of the very few parks that is pet friendly, a big plus for us.  Buying our van here is the best investment we have made and we look forward to many more years on the peninsula.
Matt and Ellie are amazing managers. The park has awesome facilities and activities during the holidays seasons full of fun.

Since Ellie and Matt have taken over the management of the park it has been nothing but fantastic their attention to detail and the upkeep of the park has been fantastic. during the  holiday periods they always have events organised for every holiday period for the kids and for the families👌👌

We purchased our cabin just over a year ago. It’s been the best decision for our family, the park managers are awesome. Matt and Ellie always go above and beyond. The facilities and the community and family feel is such a blessing, so good that we have had family start booking I. The caravan sites and start holidaying there too!

We bought a cabin 5 years ago and love it- love the cabin, love the park, the facilities and amenities it offers, the park management team and the people and family vibe it has. Importantly the management team, led by Ellie and Matt are the best the park has seen in a long time, and certainly the best in our 5 years. Nothing is too hard for them, always very responsive and lots of events organised for kids (and adults) during holiday periods. Location next to Aldi and the bakery and less than 1km to the Dromana shops and beach makes it more appealing. Love staying at the Peninsula Holiday Park.
Best park on the peninsula. Very friendly staff helpful and pleasant. Great pool and community area. Very well keep park.
Great place, very happy with this holiday park. I would recommend this park for the best holidays.

We have had a site at Peninsular Holiday Park for 18 months and really enjoy our time here. The people are friendly, there is a large area for outdoor events and there is an indoor pool. And it is great being able to bring our dog

I have been a resident at this park for over 10 years. The current managers Ellie & Matt are the best people you could find, so friendly & helpful. If you are considering a holiday place of your own, come on down and see the place for yourselves.  You'll love it!!

We bought our caravan and annex last September and we couldn’t be happier! The park is beautiful and the community is amazing. Our 14-year-old daughter was immediately welcomed with warmth and enthusiasm, and she has already made many friends — she absolutely loves spending time there.

We are Italian and really appreciate that there are many other Italians in the park — it feels like a home away from home. The managers are wonderful: always helpful, friendly, and professional. The facilities are spotless and always well maintained.

We truly love being part of this park!

We bought a caravan at Peninsula Holiday Park last year and love escaping from the city for the weekends.
So close to the beach you could easily walk it (but we're lazy and still drive) and with an Aldi only a few hundred metres from the entrance it's super convenient to get groceries.
The managers are amazing and organise events that bring everyone together, like bands at new year or Easter egg hunts for the kids.
Love the fact we can bring the dog and there's a special dog run the entire length of the park for him to let off steam before we head out for the day.
Wish the pool was open and solar heated in winter, but that's my only gripe.

Ellie and Matt are amazing park managers and probably the best I’ve come across and I’ve traveled around Aus extensively. They are so happy and helpful and Ellie really helped me out when I was having a rough time. Thanks guys and it was truly my pleasure meeting you both. Good luck with your future and never forget it’s the little things that can really make a difference. You did to me. Thanks Anthony.
By far the best annual park on the peninsula!
Very well maintained. All amenities are on point.  Well done

This park is soooo close to the highway. Would not recommend if you are light sleeper- we have had no sleep due to the cars and trucks and bikes roaring past all night. Liked the dog off lead area though. Also pool wasnt open either! Denise was lovely thought and park is neat and tidy

Only  5 van  sites,  more  a permanent  van village,  staff  Only available  for  a few hours  per  day  and  don't  return  phone  enquiries  about  faulty  equipment, amenities  good  and  clean,  location  to  shops  close,  rates  expensive, pet  friendly.

"Peninsula Holiday park" sounded appealing upon booking, however was quite disappointed to discover that campsites were situated on the side of a busy highway and therefore I had literally no sleep at all. Tried to use the camp kitchen in the morning for making some coffee so that I could drive off, however the kitchen has opening hours of 8.30am.-9pm so I had no access to it. In addition, the toilet block was a massive walk away from the campsites, super inconvenient, especially at night time or when it rains... The park sells the sites for 50.00 per night - in other locations I have been, within the Peninsula area, campsites were 35.00 and had no time restrictions were applied on kitchen areas. I had a walk around to see what the rest of the park was like and looks like it is more suited for permanent residents, rather than a "holiday park". Saw some odd handmade "street signs" saying Centrelink and whatever else - not sure why anyone would think that this would lift the already low atmosphere and create any holiday vibes ...
I cancelled my stay for the second night, it was simply an awful and anxiety provoking experience - would not recommend to anyone.

The managers matt and ellie are great, the best managers we've had. The park is well kept and the managers are very nice to talk with. The powered sites are really good, can fit quite a large caravan or tent.

Stayed there while we were attending the Mornington Peninsula caravan show.
A great place to stay
Very friendly host and team
Will be back in March 2025 to stay there again .
Pet friendly
Very helpful

A very friendly spot to stay
Clean amenties
Close to Mornington Rosebud and surrounds
Will definitely be back
MickeyBlu Australia
Great park Denise was so helpful, and on top of things, great park run by a superb manager
Really love this Caravan Park and it’s history under The Ponderosa.
It's a beautiful, clean and friendly park,we go there frequently and spend relaxing times. Would recommend this for people wishing to have a break away from every day hassles.
Excellent place we visit frequently to this caravan park. Great and friendly for the family. Close walk to the beach which is amazing. Best of all the park is dog friendly all year round.
